topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that utilize Amazon Alexa to control lighting and other devices, primarily focusing on turning lights on or off through voice commands.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa THEN Toggle light on/off using Emberlight.
IF Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa THEN Turn off lights using Philips Hue.
IF Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa THEN Turn off all hue lights using Philips Hue.
